channel.title: Building Information Modeling (BIM) :: Archidemy
channel.description: In-depth training on BIM concepts and their implementation in architectural practice using Revit.

item.title: 01: Introduction to BIM
item.author: yaniv@hatiel.com (Yaniv Hatiel)
item.description: Overview of Week 1 topics and assignments.
